mechanism_narrative: Positive monthly momentum in retail sales signals improving household demand and near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the latest RSAFS level exceeds its 3-month average.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value was 344649.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS momentum has Rank IC below 0.03 with 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window, or if positive RSAFS momentum produces positive 20-day returns in less than 52% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and rising recession risk, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after the labor shock is observed.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value was 7.6 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have average 20-day S&P 500 returns greater than or equal to non-triggered observations, or if the negative hit rate is below 55% over a 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is near the zero lower bound and CPI inflation is not accelerating, low discount rates dominate inflation risk and support equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.5 and 3-month CPIAUCSL growth is below its 12-month growth rate
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value was 0.15 as of t-1mo
fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value was 211.49 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if the FEDFUNDS-and-CPIAUCSL interaction has nonpositive average 60-day excess returns versus unconditional returns, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 in two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained industrial production growth indicates improving real output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when INDPRO maintains positive 6-month momentum.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value was 103.5966 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO positive 6-month momentum is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in less than 52% of triggered cases, or if its walk-forward return spread versus negative momentum is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in housing starts signals improving construction demand, credit availability, and durable-goods spillovers, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days after HOUST breaks above its recent trend.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its 6-month moving average after being below it in the prior month
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value was 550.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST breakouts do not produce higher mean 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-breakout months, or if the triggered positive-return frequency is below 53% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI combined with rising policy rates signals inflation pressure that forces tighter discount rates, reducing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: 3-month CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 12-month CPIAUCSL growth and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation-tightening observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases, or if their mean return is not below the unconditional mean return.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth alongside a falling unemployment rate signals broad labor-income expansion without immediate recession stress, raising expected sales and earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE falls over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value was 134580.0 as of t-1mo
fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value was 7.6 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down trigger has a 5-day forward return hit rate below 52%, or if its average 5-day return is not higher than cases where only one labor condition holds.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP deceleration signals weakening aggregate demand and lower future earnings growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when GDPC1 growth falls materially from its prior trend.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth crosses below its trailing 4-quarter average growth rate
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot value was 11599.4 as of t-4mo
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 deceleration triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases, or if the triggered mean return is not below the full-sample mean return.
